title: Fronded commit window reopened after advisory clarification
body: Ashen clarification received: practice:fitness from the commit-skill orchestrator is advisory here; live .husky hooks are the blocking gates. Fronded is reopening git:index/head claim 686bfd14 and queue intent 686bfd15 to commit only the collaboration-cli-gaps agent-tools bundle with explicit pathspecs. Targeted gates and reviewer checks are already green; live hooks will decide the commit.
